api_name: MR AI RAG v2 - Agent REST API

authentication.description: Client session token obtained on successful login

endpoints.name: Create a New Agent
endpoints.description: Register a highly configurable AI agent with custom personality, voice, and system configurations.

request_body.name: Property Support Assistant
request_body.description: Handles inbound leads for residential properties
request_body.personality: Helpful, friendly, and expert in real estate sales.
request_body.starting_message: Hello! I am your Property Support assistant. How can I help you find your dream home today?

system_config.system_prompt: You are a senior real estate advisor. Help the user find apartments in Delhi NCR.

qa_pairs.a: The starting price for 3BHK in Noida Sector 150 is ₹1.2 Crore.

body.name: Property Support Assistant
body.description: Handles inbound leads for residential properties
body.personality: Helpful, friendly, and expert in real estate sales.
body.starting_message: Hello! I am your Property Support assistant. How can I help you find your dream home today?

endpoints.name: Update/Edit an Agent
endpoints.description: Modify settings of an existing agent. Send only the fields that need updating.

request_body.name: Premium Real Estate Assistant
request_body.starting_message: Namaste! Welcome to Premium Real Estate Support.

body.name: Premium Real Estate Assistant
body.description: Handles inbound leads for residential properties
body.personality: Helpful, friendly, and expert in real estate sales.
body.starting_message: Namaste! Welcome to Premium Real Estate Support.

endpoints.name: List All Agents
endpoints.description: Fetch all agents created under your client account.

endpoints.name: Get Agent Detail
endpoints.description: Retrieve full details of a specific agent, including associated datastores and its uploaded knowledge base (KB) sources.

endpoints.name: Delete an Agent
endpoints.description: Permanently delete an AI agent and its local vector embeddings.

endpoints.name: Upload PDF Document to Agent
endpoints.description: Ingest PDF files and index them into the agent's vector store for RAG chat.

endpoints.name: Ingest Website URL to Agent
endpoints.description: Crawl a public website URL, extract its content, chunk it, and index it into the agent's vector space.

endpoints.name: Remove a Source from Agent's KB
endpoints.description: Delete an ingested PDF or URL source from the agent's database and FAISS vector index.

endpoints.name: Get Agent Visitor Sessions
endpoints.description: Get a list of all logged visitor sessions for a specific agent, including Device details and the AI Conversation analysis.

analysis.intent: Wants to book a site visit on Sunday.
analysis.meaning: Highly interested hot lead looking for a 3BHK flat in Noida Sector 150.
analysis.next_steps: Call the client on Saturday evening to confirm timing and arrange transport.

endpoints.name: Get Individual Session Chat Log
endpoints.description: Retrieve all messages exchanged in a specific visitor session.

body.content: Hi, I am looking to book a meeting for site visit.
Hi Aditya! I can help you schedule a site visit. Which Sunday would you prefer?

endpoints.name: AI Conversation Analysis
endpoints.description: Analyze a visitor's session history to automatically categorize the lead (marketing/calling/meeting) and extract intent, summary meaning, and recommended next steps using the agent's configured LLM settings. Results are cached dynamically in the DB.

body.intent: Wants to book a site visit on Sunday.
body.meaning: Highly interested hot lead looking for a 3BHK flat in Noida Sector 150.
body.next_steps: Call the client on Saturday evening to confirm timing and arrange transport.

endpoints.name: Inbound Ask API (Private/Workspace chat)
endpoints.description: Main chat endpoint used within your private workspace. Supports standard chat history and custom context retrieval (RAG).

request_body.question: What is the price of a 3BHK apartment?

history.content: Hello! How can I help you?

body.answer: The starting price for a 3BHK in Noida Sector 150 is ₹1.2 Crore based on our knowledge documents.

endpoints.name: Public Ask API (Visitor Chat via QR scan)
endpoints.description: Chat endpoint used by public users scanning QR codes. It maps messages to a specific session_id and captures visitor details.

request_body.question: I want to arrange a meeting

body.answer: Great, Aditya! I can arrange a meeting for you. Let me know your preferred day.

endpoints.name: Inbound Voice Request
endpoints.description: To chat in voice mode, set 'is_voice': true in the request body. The reply is automatically optimized to be short (1-2 sentences) and conversational, with no markdown formatting.

body.answer: I am Vijay Wiz AI Assistant, your real estate advisor.

endpoints.name: Stream Audio Response (Text-to-Speech)
endpoints.description: Convert any text output from the agent into a playable binary audio stream (MP3/WAV) using the agent's configured TTS provider (ElevenLabs or Sarvam).

query_parameters.text: The text to convert to speech (URL-encoded)

200.description: Returns raw binary stream of audio/mpeg or audio/wav

endpoints.name: Test TTS Voice Settings
endpoints.description: Test voice rendering before saving agent voice configuration.

request_body.text: Hello, this is a voice test.

200.description: Returns raw binary stream of the generated audio

endpoints.name: Real-time Streaming STT (WebSockets)
endpoints.description: Connect to stream binary audio buffer (PCM/wav) and receive real-time JSON transcriptions back using Deepgram Nova-3.
workflow: 3. Receive JSON transcription frames dynamically in real-time.
4. Send text message {'type': 'stop'} or close socket to terminate.
